recommendation: Workers performing file-creation tasks should verify artifact exists before reporting completion. Gate completion on artifact existence, not just process exit.
evidence: Stream Deck research: kind-tiger empty completion

recommendation: Research tasks should constrain web fetch output size — extract relevant sections only, not full pages. Prevents context exhaustion during synthesis.
evidence: Stream Deck research: 3 consecutive failures at synthesis stage after web fetches

recommendation: Research workers should write findings incrementally (per-source) rather than accumulating all results before writing. Prevents synthesis stall by persisting partial results.
evidence: Stream Deck research: clever-fox stalled synthesizing 3 subagent results
Stream Deck research: kind-tiger stalled after 6 min thinking
